sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { FileText, RefreshCw, Search, Filter, Download, User, Clock, Activity } from 'lucide-react'; function AuditLogs({ devices, loading, onRefresh }) { const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); const [filterAction, setFilterAction] = useState('all'); // Mock logs const logs = [ { id: '1', timestamp: '2026-02-14 22:30:15', user: 'admin', action: 'UPDATE', device: 'BRAS_NE8000', details: 'Atualizado campo vendor', ip: '192.168.1.100' }, { id: '2', timestamp: '2026-02-14 22:25:10', user: 'admin', action: 'SSH_CONNECT', device: 'PPPoE_CARDOSO_MOREIRA', details: 'Conexão SSH estabelecida', ip: '192.168.1.100' }, { id: '3', timestamp: '2026-02-14 22:20:05', user: 'system', action: 'BACKUP', device: 'BRAS_NE8000', details: 'Backup automático executado', ip: '127.0.0.1' }, { id: '4', timestamp: '2026-02-14 22:15:00', user: 'admin', action: 'CREATE', device: 'PPPoE_CARDOSO_MOREIRA', details: 'Dispositivo criado', ip: '192.168.1.100' }, { id: '5', timestamp: '2026-02-14 22:10:30', user: 'admin', action: 'LOGIN', device: '-', details: 'Login realizado com sucesso', ip: '192.168.1.100' }, ]; const actionColors = { CREATE: 'text-green-500', UPDATE: 'text-blue-500', DELETE: 'text-red-500', SSH_CONNECT: 'text-purple-500', BACKUP: 'text-yellow-500', LOGIN: 'text-cyan-500', }; const filteredLogs = logs.filter(log => { const matchesSearch = log.device.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || log.details.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || log.user.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()); const matchesFilter = filterAction === 'all' || log.action === filterAction; return matchesSearch && matchesFilter; }); return (

setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary" />
{/* Stats */}

Total de Logs

{new Set(logs.map(l => l.user)).size}

{log.timestamp} {log.user} {log.action} {log.device} {log.details} {log.ip}

); } export default AuditLogs;
